name: Allow Proxies?
description:
"Proxy Settings

Allowing proxies means your character tokens could potentially be leaked as they have to return back to the users desired proxy server. Not allowing proxies will only allow JanitorLLM and OpenAI to work. We will be adding more official API providers in the future.

- Allow Proxies
- Do Not Allow Proxies (JanitorLLM and OpenAI only)"

So yeah I've always wondered what the heck any of that is even supposed to mean, as Janitor.ai has been EXTREMELY helpful by offering an explanation right there with that stuff so you know exactly what it means and what it does, AND by being kind enough to have it be a pat of their FAQs and even other parts of the site explaining how it works!
... =w=;;

Honestly for some of the ai's I made I'd like for the definitions to be visible, and others I simply wouldn't mind. Often it'd be a great way to help you understand my characters and, in some cases, the work I put into them.
But this whole thing about tokens leaking scares me with my anxiety and the lack of any explanation for what it means, and I'm curious about what this whole "JanitorLLM and Open AI only" thing means too, since it's not like they include an explanation for it or anything

Any help would really be appreciated. Thank you!

Edit: Thank you for the help! So I guess this means I’ll start showing the definitions for my AI’s then?

Lemme know if I should or not!
creator: Kratos_Zangoose
